final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an editorial photo of Korean café-style fashionable coffee and desserts, shot in a smartphone aesthetic suitable for Instagram. No people.

Then, observe every element that appears in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each one.

【Description rules】
・Thin hand-drawn lines as if drawn with a white pen
・One-stroke style, rough and slightly uneven
・Outline traces around the outer edges of objects
・Use arrows or dashed lines to guide the eye

【Text rules】
・Japanese handwritten text（平仮名7割・簡単な漢字3割）
・Short, like talking to oneself
・Tone: "日記・ひとこと・気持ちをのせた"

【Comment generation rules】
・飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：さっぱり、やさしい甘さ）
・食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：しっとり、さいこう）
・空間 → 雰囲気（例：まったり、いい時間）
・全体 → ひとこと総括（例：しあわせすぎた～）

【Decoration】
・Steam wisps, sparkles, heart shapes, small emoji-like doodles — added in moderation
・Not overdone; preserve "breathing space" / white space

【Finished style】
・Instagram Stories feel, magazine rough-notes aesthetic
・Fashionable yet relaxed atmosphere

Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlay
Composition: 
Subject: Korean café-style coffee and desserts, no people
Scene/backdrop: Korean café
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 平仮名7割・簡単な漢字3割の手書き日本語注釈
Constraints: no people; white hand-drawn annotation lines overlaid on photo
Avoid:
